def solve(prices : Array(Int64), strategy : Array(Int64), k : Int64) : Int64
  n = prices.length
  base = 0
  for i in 0..n-1
    base += strategy[i] * prices[i]
  end

  a = Array.new(n) { |i| -strategy[i] * prices[i] }
  b = Array.new(n) { |i| (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i] }

  prefix_a = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }
  prefix_b = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }

  for i in 1..n
    prefix_a[i] = prefix_a[i-1] + a[i-1]
    prefix_b[i] = prefix_b[i-1] + b[i-1]
  end

  m = k / 2
  max_change = -Float64::INFINITY

  for l in 0..(n - k)
    part1 = prefix_a[l + m] - prefix_a[l]
    part2 = prefix_b[l + k] - prefix_b[l + m]
    current = part1 + part2
    if current > max_change
      max_change = current
    end
  end

  return base + [max_change, 0].max
end
```

def solve(prices : Array(Int64), strategy : Array(Int64), k : Int64) : Int64
  n = prices.length
  base = 0
  for i in 0..n-1
    base += strategy[i] * prices[i]
  end

  a = Array.new(n) { |i| -strategy[i] * prices[i] }
  b = Array.new(n) { |i| (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i] }

  prefix_a = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }
  prefix_b = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }

  for i in 1..n
    prefix_a[i] = prefix_a[i-1] + a[i-1]
    prefix_b[i] = prefix_b[i-1] + b[i-1]
  end

  m = k / 2
  max_change = -Float64::INFINITY

  for l in 0..(n - k)
    part1 = prefix_a[l + m] - prefix_a[l]
    part2 = prefix_b[l + k] - prefix_b[l + m]
    current = part1 + part2
    if current > max_change
      max_change = current
    end
  end

  return base + [max_change, 0].max
end
```

def solve(prices : Array(Int64), strategy : Array(Int64), k : Int64) : Int64
    n = prices.length
    base = 0
    for i in 0...n
        base += strategy[i] * prices[i]
    end

    a = Array::new(n) { 0 }
    b = Array::new(n) { 0 }
    for i in 0...n
        a[i] = -strategy[i] * prices[i]
        b[i] = (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i]
    end

    prefix_a = Array::new(n + 1) { 0 }
    prefix_b = Array::new(n + 1) { 0 }
    for i in 1..n
        prefix_a[i] = prefix_a[i - 1] + a[i - 1]
        prefix_b[i] = prefix_b[i - 1] + b[i - 1]
    end

    m = k / 2
    max_change = -Float64::INFINITY
    for l in 0..(n - k)
        start = l
        end_pos = l + k
        first_part = prefix_a[start + m] - prefix_a[start]
        second_part = prefix_b[end_pos] - prefix_b[start + m]
        current_change = first_part + second_part
        if current_change > max_change
            max_change = current_change
        end
    end

    return base + [max_change, 0].max
end

function solve(prices, strategy, k) {

    const n = prices.length;

    // 计算原利润

    let base = 0;

    for (let i=0; i <n; i++) {

        base += strategy[i] * prices[i];

    }

    // 预处理a和b数组

    const a = new Array(n);

    const b = new Array(n);

    for (let i=0; i <n; i++) {

        a[i] = -strategy[i] * prices[i];

        b[i] = (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i];

    }

    // 计算prefix_a和prefix_b

    const prefix_a = new Array(n+1).fill(0);

    const prefix_b = new Array(n+1).fill(0);

    for (let i=1; i <=n; i++) {

        prefix_a[i] = prefix_a[i-1] + a[i-1];

        prefix_b[i] = prefix_b[i-1] + b[i-1];

    }

    // 遍历所有可能的窗口

    let max_change = -Infinity;

    const m = k/2;

    for (let l=0; l <= n -k; l++) {

        // 前半部分是l到l + m -1，共m个元素

        // 前半部分的总和是 prefix_a[l +m] - prefix_a[l]

        // 后半部分是 l +m 到 l +k -1，共m个元素

        // 后半部分的总和是 prefix_b[l +k] - prefix_b[l +m]

        const part1 = prefix_a[l + m] - prefix_a[l];

        const part2 = prefix_b[l +k] - prefix_b[l + m];

        const current_change = part1 + part2;

        if (current_change > max_change) {

            max_change = current_change;

        }

    }

    // 最终结果是 base + max(max_change, 0)

    return base + Math.max(max_change, 0);

}
